utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check each for full specification per the format requirement: 'with costs' and appropriate description. 1) health_coverage: includes physical and mental health insurance with costs — yes, details mention both and monthly_cost is provided. 2) property_coverage: home/contents insurance with costs — yes, contents/home described and monthly_cost provided. 3) travel_coverage: travel insurance with costs — yes, described and monthly_cost provided. 4) additional_services: any enhancement services with costs — provided (None) with monthly_cost 0. 5) total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown — includes total_monthly_cost and total_annual_cost; also includes savings, which is extra but acceptable; the required monthly/annual breakdown is present. Therefore all 5 are fully specified according to what should be covered with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named items that correspond to entries in the ground-truth ratings: HealthFirst Standard Plan (under primary health physical and mental), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (under property home_content), and InsurePlus Standard Plan (under travel_insurance). The 'additional_services' entry is 'None' and does not map to any rated item. Therefore, I matched each selected plan to its exact rating from the ground-truth list.
